revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-240

The difference between the total reduction in sound pressure level during the propagation of a sound and that due to the spherical divergence loss.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Excess attenuation}}
